homepage_text.hero_subtext: Photo-realistic 3D visualisations for interior designers, building companies, developers, architects and real estate agents — helping you sell the vision, before a single wall goes up.
homepage_text.manifesto_heading: Clients don't buy a floor plan. They buy the feeling of already standing in the finished room — and that's exactly what a photo-realistic render gives them, well before the build begins.
homepage_text.services_subtext: A look at the work we create, and the benefits it brings to every project.
homepage_text.work_subtext: Commercial, residential and property development projects — take a look inside some of our work.
homepage_text.reviews_subtext: See what interior designers, developers and building companies say about working with Visualise NZ.
homepage_text.cta_subtext: Send through your plans, drawings or measurements and let's talk about what's possible.

footer_description: Supporting the New Zealand design & building industry with professional 3D visualisation.
bio_text: Based on the Kāpiti Coast and working with clients throughout New Zealand, Melissa is easy to work with, realistic about pricing, and always keen to hear about the next project. Get in touch — she'd love to help bring your project to life.
